generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure highlighted a concrete, local example of underfunded civil defense, reinforcing the importance of preparedness. The personal and urgent tone increased my concern, nudging my opinion toward stronger support.

request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news - our city's emergency response teams are stretched thin because of budget cuts. When the next disaster hits (and it will), we'll be left vulnerable because politicians prioritized other things over basic civil defense. Time to demand better preparedness before it's too late. #CivilDefenseMatters #SafetyFirst
